languages.text: "Не намеренно. Я лгал нам обоим. Я не помнил этих деталей до сегодняшнего дня".
"Not intentionally. I lied to both of us. I did not recall those details until today."
languages.original_text: "Не намеренно. Я лгал нам обоим. Я не помнил этих деталей до сегодняшнего дня".

traits.locale_text: "Not intentionally. I lied to both of us. I did not recall those details until today."
"Not intentionally. I lied to both of us. I did not recall those details until today."
"Not intentionally. I lied to both of us. I did not recall those details until today."

languages.text: «No ha sido intencionadamente, nos he mentido a ambos. Hasta hoy, no recordaba esos detalles».
languages.original_text: "Not intentionally. I lied to both of us. I did not recall those details until today."

traits.locale_text: «No ha sido intencionadamente, nos he mentido a ambos. Hasta hoy, no recordaba esos detalles».

languages.text: “并非有意为之。我也被我自己骗了。直到今天，我才回想起这些细节。”
languages.original_text: "Not intentionally. I lied to both of us. I did not recall those details until today."

traits.locale_text: “并非有意为之。我也被我自己骗了。直到今天，我才回想起这些细节。”

languages.text: « Pas délibérément. Je me mentais autant qu'à vous. Ce n'est qu'aujourd'hui que ces détails me sont revenus en mémoire. »
languages.original_text: "Not intentionally. I lied to both of us. I did not recall those details until today."

traits.locale_text: « Pas délibérément. Je me mentais autant qu'à vous. Ce n'est qu'aujourd'hui que ces détails me sont revenus en mémoire. »

languages.text: "Kasten değil. İkimize de yalan söyledim. Bu detayları bugüne dek hatırlamıyordum."
languages.original_text: "Not intentionally. I lied to both of us. I did not recall those details until today."

traits.locale_text: "Kasten değil. İkimize de yalan söyledim. Bu detayları bugüne dek hatırlamıyordum."

languages.text: "Nicht absichtlich. Ich habe uns beide belogen. Ich habe mich an diese Details bis heute nicht erinnert."
languages.original_text: "Not intentionally. I lied to both of us. I did not recall those details until today."

traits.locale_text: "Nicht absichtlich. Ich habe uns beide belogen. Ich habe mich an diese Details bis heute nicht erinnert."

languages.text: 「故意ではない。私は2人に嘘をついた。今日までその詳細を思い出すことはなかった」
languages.original_text: "Not intentionally. I lied to both of us. I did not recall those details until today."

traits.locale_text: 「故意ではない。私は2人に嘘をついた。今日までその詳細を思い出すことはなかった」
